item.title: Chicken Tikka Masala Hot Dog
item.description: A bold fusion of two favorites in one epic hot dog, bringing together comforting chicken tikka masala flavors and classic cookout appeal.

media:content.media:title: Chicken Tikka Masala Hot Dog
media:content.media:description: A bold fusion of two favorites in one epic hot dog, bringing together comforting chicken tikka masala flavors and classic cookout appeal.

item.title: Flavor-Packed Hot Dog Upgrade
item.description: This hot dog goes beyond the basics with bold flavor and a satisfying, indulgent twist.

media:content.media:title: Flavor-Packed Hot Dog Upgrade
media:content.media:description: This hot dog goes beyond the basics with bold flavor and a satisfying, indulgent twist.

item.title: Cheesy Spicy Hot Dog Recipe Winner
item.description: A cheesy, spicy hot dog recipe that’s perfectly crafted for a flavorful, comforting bite.

media:content.media:title: Cheesy Spicy Hot Dog Recipe Winner
media:content.media:description: A cheesy, spicy hot dog recipe that’s perfectly crafted for a flavorful, comforting bite.

item.title: Viral Korean Street Food, Recreated
item.description: A from-scratch take on a viral Korean street food recipe, made with approachable steps and bold flavor.

media:content.media:title: Viral Korean Street Food, Recreated
media:content.media:description: A from-scratch take on a viral Korean street food recipe, made with approachable steps and bold flavor.

item.title: Cubano Open-Faced Loaf with Melted Swiss
item.description: A layered Cubano-style loaf with citrusy shredded pork, smoked ham, pickles, and melted Swiss on French bread. Serve with the reserved cooking juices.

media:content.media:title: Cubano Open-Faced Loaf with Melted Swiss
media:content.media:description: A layered Cubano-style loaf with citrusy shredded pork, smoked ham, pickles, and melted Swiss on French bread. Serve with the reserved cooking juices.

item.title: Viral Mozzarella Chili Hot Dog
item.description: A must-try hot dog topped with mozzarella and chili for a cheesy, comforting bite with bold flavor and easy appeal.

media:content.media:title: Viral Mozzarella Chili Hot Dog
media:content.media:description: A must-try hot dog topped with mozzarella and chili for a cheesy, comforting bite with bold flavor and easy appeal.

item.title: Viral McDonald's China Cilantro Sundae
item.description: Watch how we create the viral McDonald's China Cilantro Sundae.

media:content.media:title: Viral McDonald's China Cilantro Sundae
media:content.media:description: Watch how we create the viral McDonald's China Cilantro Sundae.

item.title: Savory Beef, Gravy and Cheese Pulls
item.description: Loaded with savory beef, deep gravy, and structural cheese pulls.

media:content.media:title: Savory Beef, Gravy and Cheese Pulls
media:content.media:description: Loaded with savory beef, deep gravy, and structural cheese pulls.

item.title: Birria Corn Dogs with Bold Flavor
item.description: A comfort-food mashup with crispy corn dog coating and rich birria-inspired flavor. Recipe in the comments!

media:content.media:title: Birria Corn Dogs with Bold Flavor
media:content.media:description: A comfort-food mashup with crispy corn dog coating and rich birria-inspired flavor. Recipe in the comments!
